# Usage Account

Manages a Usage Account in a Foundry enrollment.

  The following operations are currently supported:

    - Create a Usage Account
    - Update a Usage Account
    - Delete a Usage Account
    - Import a Usage Account

    Note: a Usage Account's `enrollment_rid` is immutable after creation, and Usage Accounts where `internal` is `true` are system-managed and cannot be modified or deleted.

```terraform
resource "foundry_usage_account" "example-usage-account" {
  enrollment_rid = "ri.control-panel.main.customer.example-enrollment-rid"
  display_name   = "Engineering"
  description    = "Tracks usage for the engineering org."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Display name of the Usage Account.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the Usage Account.
- `enrollment_rid` (String) The RID of the Enrollment this Usage Account belongs to. This field is required if the resource is created within Terraform, but not necessarily if created outside of Terraform and imported.

### Read-Only

- `internal` (Boolean) Whether this Usage Account is internal. Internal Usage Accounts are system-managed and cannot be modified or deleted.
- `rid` (String) RID of the Usage Account.
